product: New compute policy form is now generally available
tagline: The new compute policy form is now generally available.
what_it_does: The new compute policy form is now generally available. The new form allows you to configure policy definitions using dropdown menus and other UI elements. This means admins can write policies without having to learn or reference the policy syntax.
why_it_matters: This metric is a direct way to control cost at the individual compute level.
plain_summary: The new compute policy form is now generally available. The new form allows you to configure policy definitions using dropdown menus and other UI elements.
key_takeaway: The new compute policy form is now generally available.
